---
title: "Browse Posts"
comments: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
listing:
  type: default
  contents:
    - posts
    - "!posts/fermat-christmas-theorem/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: numbered
  fields: [title, subtitle, description, date, categories]
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: [title, description, categories]
  feed:
    title: "SheafofThoughts"
---
